title: /admin route with summary cards, cost chart, and recent activity
userStory: As Steve, I want an /admin view so that the system is observable and the portfolio has a screenshot worth showing.
acceptanceCriteria: Server queries: 7-day tool calls grouped by name (count, p50, p99, error count); 30-day cost per day broken out by model; latest 50 tool calls in last 24h
Page renders summary cards (total calls, total cost, error rate), bar chart of cost per day (chart.js or hand-rolled SVG), recent activity table with input/output drill-down
Authn: same bearer-cookie as the rest of the app (no public access)
Document the cost-attribution convention on the page
Verify: /admin loads behind auth and shows non-zero numbers after a few chat turns
